name: resetFlexRayCCEx
title: resetFlexRayCCEx
syntax: long resetFlexRayCCEx (int channel, int wuChMask, int wuCount, int wuTxIdle, int wuTxLow, char[] cfg);
description: This function initializes the FlexRay Communication Controller (CC) and generates the specified wake-up pattern before reintegration in the cluster or the start-up.

parameters.name: wuCount
parameters.description: Number of repetitions (2 – 63) of the wake-up symbol in a wake-up pattern.

parameters.name: wuTxIdle
parameters.description: This number designates the number of idle bits in a wake-up symbol. According to protocol specification, this should result in 18 µs.

parameters.name: wuTxLow
parameters.description: This number designates the number of low bits in a wake-up symbol. According to protocol specification, this should result in 6 µs.

parameters.name: cfg
parameters.description: Character data array. This is currently not used and is of no importance.

description: The following program resets the FlexRay interface of the attached channel and sends a wake-up (if network is idle), when the <W> key is pressed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
